assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 13-15 contain the JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.2 (lines 27-28): "TC-8022's summary contains `(rhtpa-2.1)`, which matches the current issue's stream suffix `[rhtpa-2.1]`. Match found: TC-8022 is a preemptive remediation task for this exact CVE and stream." The filtering is explicitly based on summary content matching the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Action 1 (lines 38-48): "jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend")" with rationale: "The 'Depend' link type is the standard linkage used between Vulnerability issues and their remediation Tasks."

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Action 2 (lines 52-63): Shows current labels ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"] updated to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] via jira.edit_issue. Rationale: "Removing the label reflects this status change" from preemptive to standard remediation task.

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 75: "Remediation already exists for stream 2.1.x via TC-8022. Step 7 will **skip** new remediation task creation for this stream." Also triage-outcome.md line 95: "Step 7 (Remediation task creation): Skipped -- reconciliation in Step 4.4 identified TC-8022 as the existing remediation task. No new tasks needed."
